message:
fix: use prefix match instead of substring in FindMR (gt-q90g)

strings.Contains could return wrong MR when a partial ID matched
anywhere in the string (e.g., "abc" matching "gt-xyzabc"). Changed
to strings.HasPrefix so partial matches only work from the start
of the ID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
